tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Letter Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Letter Writing का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Dear friend, I hope you are well. I want to tell you about my new job. Respected Sir, I am writing this letter to you as a complaint. The condition of the road is very bad. Please solve this problem.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Letter Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Letter Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Dear mother, I am fine here. I miss you a lot. Your loving son. Respected Editor, I request you to publish this letter. This problem is affecting the whole city.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "प्रिय बहन, तुम्हारी शादी की बधाई।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Dear sister, congratulations on your wedding.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "The condition of the road are very bad."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The condition of the road is very bad.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Letter Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Letter Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Respected Manager, I am writing about my order. I received the wrong product. Please replace it as soon as possible. Yours faithfully, Rahul Sharma.
